chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master.Cust Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The customer identifier (CUST_ID) in the CUSTOMER_MASTER table, serving as the unique key to identify a customer and as a referential link to related records.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Customer is an individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is a single product entry within an order that represents one product purchase, includes the price at order time, a unique line identifier, and references exactly one product.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | **Examples**:
- Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50 | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item.Product Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: An Order Line Item is the record representing a single product included in a Sales Order, linked to the parent order via ORDER_ID and to the product via PRODUCT_ID, with LINE_ID as its primary key.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)
 | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | **Order Line Item Relationships**:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | **Sales Order Relationships**:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)
 | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | **Pri

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A financial transaction recording funds received to settle a Sales Order, typically associated with a single order and including attributes such as the payment amount.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Payment amount | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)
 | A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: The Sales Order Header (SALES_ORDER_HDR) is the master record for each customer sales order, identified by ORDER_ID and linked to the customer via CUST_ID, serving as the parent for related line items and payments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)
 | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity representing the delivery of goods for a Sales Order, identified by a unique shipment ID and linked to one Sales Order; may include a tracking number.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Tracking number | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | **Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)
 | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: Product identifier column (primary key) in the TB_PRODUCT table, used to uniquely identify products and referenced by order line items.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree.

**Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO | | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)
 | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Products Returned Within
entities_post_resolution.definition: Policy allowing customers to return purchased products within 30 days in exchange for a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer profile data including identifiers, contact information, regional segmentation, and account status for active customers.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores core product information including identifiers, product name, category reference, pricing, and active status for catalog and sales use.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores the hierarchical categories for products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores the header information for customer sales orders, including identifiers, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation timestamp, delivery timestamp, and record creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual line items for customer orders, including the linked order and product, along with the quantity and pricing details for each line.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments for customer orders, including identifiers, associated order, origin warehouse, shipping timestamp, tracking details, and current shipment status.
